---
title: "Figure S2"
author: "Phil Zhou"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r load_packages}
library(svglite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(gplots)
library(zoo)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r load_dfs}
#FigS2_Endo vs repo BEAN endo 1.96 only
endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96 <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_Ex4", "FigS2_Endo vs repo BEAN endo 1.96 only.csv"))

#FigS2_endogenous RPM violin
endo_RPM_violin <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_Ex4", "FigS2_endogenous RPM violin.csv"))

#FigS2_repo_Missense, syn, stop BEAN
repo_Missense <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_Ex4", "FigS2_repo_Missense, syn, stop BEAN.csv"))

#FigS2_reporter edit frac violin
reporter_edit_frac_violin <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_Ex4", "FigS2_reporter edit frac violin.csv"))
```


```{r fig_S2A}
fig_S2A <- ggplot(endo_RPM_violin,
       aes(x = "", y = Endogenous.edit.RPM)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +   # <-- removes gap between x-axis and violin
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Endogenous variant abundance (RPM)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
    )

#print out figure panel
fig_S2A

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S2"), "FigS2A.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S2A,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S2B}
fig_S2B <- ggplot(reporter_edit_frac_violin,
       aes(x = "", y = Mean.reporter.edit.fraction)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +   # <-- removes gap between x-axis and violin
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "pegRNA reporter edit fraction") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
    )

#print out figure panel
fig_S2B

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S2"), "FigS2B.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S2B,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S2C}
# ---- 1) Long dataframe ---- 
df_long <- repo_Missense %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Synonymous, Missense, Stop),
    names_to  = "Variant",
    values_to = "Score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variant = factor(Variant, levels = c("Synonymous", "Missense", "Stop"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Score), is.finite(Score))

# ---- 2) Comparisons ---- 
comparisons_S2C <- list(
  c("Synonymous", "Missense"),
  c("Missense",   "Stop"),
  c("Synonymous", "Stop")
)

# ---- 3) Y scaling (ONLY for stats placement, not plot limits) ---- 
y_max <- max(df_long$Score, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- diff(range(df_long$Score, na.rm = TRUE))
if (y_range == 0) y_range <- 1

#  ---- 4) Stats (Holm) ---- 
stat_test_S2C <- compare_means(
  Score ~ Variant,
  data = df_long,
  method = "t.test",
  method.args = list(var.equal = FALSE),
  comparisons = comparisons_S2C,
  p.adjust.method = "holm"
) %>%
  mutate(
    p.signif = case_when(
      p.adj <= 1e-4 ~ "****",
      p.adj <= 1e-3 ~ "***",
      p.adj <= 1e-2 ~ "**",
      p.adj <= 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "n.s."
    ),
    y.position = y_max + c(0.05, 0.12, 0.19) * y_range
  )

#  ---- 5) Plot ---- 
fig_S2C <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Variant, y = Score, fill = Variant)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Variant),   # keep local mapping like original
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0),
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "black", size = 0.6) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.5) +   # removed width + color override
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    stat_test_S2C,
    label = "p.signif",
    xmin = "group1",
    xmax = "group2",
    y.position = "y.position",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hide.ns = TRUE,
    tip.length = 0.01,
    size = 6,
    bracket.size = 0.6,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Reporter LDLR137-219 BEAN z score") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

#print out figure panel
fig_S2C

# stats output
stat_test_S2C

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S2"), "FigS2C.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S2C,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```


```{r fig_S2D}
#Endogenous vs. Reporter BEAN significant only fig_S2_

fig_S2D <- ggplot(endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96, aes(x=Endo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj_SD.1, y=Repo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj.SD.0.45)) + geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) + theme_classic() + labs(y= "Reporter LDLR137-219 BEAN z score", x = "Endogenous LDLR137-219 BEAN z score") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) + xlim(0, NA) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +   # no gap at left/right
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))     # no gap at bottom/top

#print out figure panel
fig_S2D

# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S2D ----
cor.test(endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96$Endo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj_SD.1, endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96$Repo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj.SD.0.45, method = "pearson")
cor.test(endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96$Endo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj_SD.1, endo_repo_BEAN_endo_1.96$Repo.BEAN.mu_Z_adj.SD.0.45, method = "spearman")

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S2"), "FigS2D.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S2D,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r printing_fig_S2}
fig_S2 <- (fig_S2A + fig_S2B) / (fig_S2C + fig_S2D) +
  plot_annotation() &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 20, 10))   # bottom margin increased

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S2"), "Fig_S2.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S2,
  width    = 12,
  height   = 12,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
